trends.name: gurnoor brar
trends.why_now: Indian pacer warned for ICC Code of Conduct breach (throwing ball dangerously); emerging talent in India's pace bowling rotation.
trends.angle: Ride the 'new Indian pace talent' narrative—Brar's aggressive style and ICC discipline create a breakout-player story.

trends.name: Kyle Hamilton
